name: Start in Pallet Town
description: Get starter Pokemon from Prof. Oak's lab
objective: Go downstairs, try to leave town north, go to Oak's lab, pick a starter

name: Rival Battle 1
description: Battle rival in Oak's lab after choosing starter

name: Oak's Parcel
description: Go north to Viridian City, get Oak's Parcel from Pokemart, deliver to Oak
objective: Walk north through Route 1 to Viridian City, get parcel, return to Oak

name: Route 1 & Viridian Forest
description: Train on Route 1 and through Viridian Forest to reach Pewter City
objective: Grind to level 12-14, catch a Pikachu or Caterpie in Viridian Forest

name: Pewter City Gym (Brock)
description: Rock-type gym. Use Water/Grass if available, otherwise grind
objective: Defeat Brock for the Boulder Badge. His team: Geodude Lv12, Onix Lv14

name: Mt. Moon
description: Travel through Route 3 and Mt. Moon to reach Cerulean City
objective: Fight trainers, navigate Mt. Moon, pick up fossils

name: Cerulean City Gym (Misty)
objective: Defeat Misty for Cascade Badge. Her team: Staryu Lv18, Starmie Lv21

name: S.S. Anne & Vermilion
description: Go south through Route 5, underground to Route 6, reach Vermilion City
objective: Board S.S. Anne, get HM01 Cut from captain, prepare for Lt. Surge

name: Vermilion City Gym (Lt. Surge)
description: Electric-type gym with trash can puzzle
objective: Solve trash can locks, defeat Lt. Surge. His team: Voltorb Lv21, Pikachu Lv18, Raichu Lv24

name: Rock Tunnel to Lavender
description: Go east from Cerulean through Rock Tunnel (need Flash)
objective: Navigate Rock Tunnel to reach Lavender Town

name: Celadon City Gym (Erika)
objective: Defeat Erika for Rainbow Badge. Her team: Victreebel Lv29, Tangela Lv24, Vileplume Lv29

name: Pokemon Tower
description: Get Silph Scope from Team Rocket in Celadon, clear Pokemon Tower
objective: Rescue Mr. Fuji from Pokemon Tower, get Poke Flute

name: Fuchsia City Gym (Koga)
objective: Defeat Koga for Soul Badge. His team: Koffing Lv37, Muk Lv39, Koffing Lv37, Weezing Lv43

name: Saffron City Gym (Sabrina)
description: Psychic-type gym with warp tiles. Use Bug/Ghost/Dark
objective: Clear Silph Co first, then defeat Sabrina. Her team: Kadabra Lv38, Mr. Mime Lv37, Venomoth Lv38, Alakazam Lv43

name: Cinnabar Island Gym (Blaine)
objective: Defeat Blaine for Volcano Badge. His team: Growlithe Lv42, Ponyta Lv40, Rapidash Lv42, Arcanine Lv47

name: Viridian City Gym (Giovanni)
objective: Defeat Giovanni for Earth Badge. His team: Rhyhorn Lv45, Dugtrio Lv42, Nidoqueen Lv44, Nidoking Lv45, Rhyhorn Lv50

name: Victory Road
objective: Get through Victory Road to reach the Pokemon League

name: Elite Four & Champion
description: Battle Lorelei (Ice), Bruno (Fighting), Agatha (Ghost), Lance (Dragon), then Champion rival
objective: Defeat all Elite Four members and the Champion to beat the game
